## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Zuplo and GrowthX to discuss content performance, refresh strategies, and upcoming projects.](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Traffic metrics show increased impressions but slight decrease in clicks, potentially due to AI-generated search snippets](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Content refresh project underway, focusing on top 20 pieces and addressing potential cannibalization issues](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Programmatic API directory project in progress, aiming to create more scalable and enriched content](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [Blog redesign planned to improve curation and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [Impressions up by 7,000, clicks down by 3 compared to last week](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Average position remains stable despite increased impressions](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Potential impact of AI-generated search snippets on click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [Investigating specific page performance, including branded traffic to zuplo.com](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [Focusing on top 20 performing pieces](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Analyzing metrics over time for each piece](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Enrichment strategies:](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
      - [Competitor analysis for content gaps](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
      - [Stylistic improvements (quotes, images, headers)](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [Technical health checks (broken links, structure)](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
  - [Addressing potential cannibalization in lower-ranking content](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Considering refresh for 3-month-old content not yet ranking well](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Programmatic API Directory Project

  - [Dave building out CSV workflows for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [Aim to create enriched, custom API documentation pages](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)
  - [Focus on creating a superior user experience compared to existing catalogs](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)

### Blog Redesign

  - [Plans to make the blog homepage more curated](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
  - [Removing dates from thumbnails](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [Reducing image use on the main page](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [New design inspiration from Cloudflare's blog layout](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)

### FinTech Content Development

  - [Exploring banking and FinTech-related content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Initial focus on PSD2 regulations and regional validation standards](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)
  - [Cautious approach to avoid liability in recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/7nHUx4QMKyzrq7AyLy4WGPbwPLhqYSLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
